title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: A workflow that uses Claude Opus for planning and integration, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and orchestrates them through Archon to build beautiful frontends efficiently. The approach leverages each model's strengths in sequence: Opus for logic and copy, Gemini for design quality, then Opus again for integrations and deployment.
